content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: 7/6/78

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
        Jeanne Pritchard

Subject: Phone conversation with Gary Kovall, Atlantic-Richfield Co.

Mr. Kovall wanted to know if an in-kind contribution is made if a corporation's PAC makes a room available to a candidate to speak to the corporation's employees. No fees are paid; donuts and coffee may be served.

Answer: If the room is available to all candidates, there is no reporting obligation.

I sent him a copy of Nan's letter to Polak.

Gary Kovall
Atlantic-Richfield Co.
515 So. Flower
Los Angeles, CA 90071
(213) 486-2451
